title: Lead Revenue Manager at Six Senses India

jsonLd.title: Lead Revenue Manager at Six Senses India
jsonLd.description:
We at Six Senses India are looking for an experienced Revenue Manager based out of Nagpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Six Senses India:
Six Senses India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Front Office

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Six Senses India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
